name: com.bovinelabs.timeline.vfxforge
description:
A BovineLabs DOTS Timeline track that plays Fire Alt VFX Forge effects.

The Play VFX track spawns a fresh Fire Alt persistent VFX instance on a clip's start edge and kills it on the clip's end, so every activation plays from the start (no stale/finished particle state), the whole composite graph is one spawn, and the instance follows a resolved target entity (Owner/Source/Target/Self or a linked enemy) for the clip's duration.
